## What It Is
- AI humanization and bypass tool that rewrites AI-generated content to pass detection
- Integrations cover the obvious 80% of stacks (Zapier, Make, Slack, Notion, Google Workspace)
- Fast onboarding with transparent pricing and no surprise upcharges

## Pricing (June 2026)
$8/mo with 20% off using verified codes. The free tier includes watermarked output with a usage ceiling — most users upgrade for watermark-free output.
